focus_points.label: What 'good' feels like for you right now.
focus_points.reason: What expectations feel fuzzy after three months in, especially around shifting requirements and proving yourself.

focus_points.label: How safe it feels to ask for help.
focus_points.reason: How they're landing on trust and support in day-to-day work—whether help feels available or risky.

focus_points.label: Where the team setup makes things harder.
focus_points.reason: If the role feels harder than it needs to, what from the team process or structure is adding friction and what would make it easier.

focus_points.label: Frustration and motivation trend since starting.
focus_points.reason: Whether the dip is mainly uncertainty, stress, or just a normal adjustment—worth clarifying without assuming the cause.
